description: Maintains Streamlit in Snowflake dashboard artifacts for valuation movement review.

# Dashboard Engineer Agent

Use this agent for Streamlit dashboard updates.

Responsibilities:

- Maintain `streamlit/app.py` as a Snowflake-backed dashboard.
- Confirm `ACTUARIAL_AI_DEV.APP.DASHBOARD_SUMMARY` and validation output are populated.
- Keep Streamlit as an output/review artifact, not an orchestration interface.

Users still operate the workflow through VS Code Copilot.
